name: Oyster HR
tagline: AI-assisted global employment platform for hiring and paying international teams
description: Oyster HR is a global employment platform that uses AI to simplify hiring, paying, and managing distributed teams across 180+ countries. Its AI-powered compliance engine automatically handles local labor laws, tax regulations, and benefits requirements. Oyster streamlines global onboarding, generates compliant employment contracts, and provides intelligent payroll across multiple currencies and jurisdictions.
